python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-21':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 109135
Title: By February 28, 2026, which Ukrainian city will be reported as the site of a deadly attack in which two explosions hit police responding to an emergency at a store?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-01. Ukraine has many cities, and major public-safety incidents can happen in different places. News reports and local authorities usually identify the city where a serious incident takes place.
---
QID: 162065
Title: Which country will finish the 2026 Winter Olympics with 30 total medals, setting a new national Winter Olympics record, by 22 February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. The 2026 Winter Olympics are scheduled for February 2026. Final medal standings become official after the last events are completed and the Games close.
---
QID: 221278
Title: Which country will win the men's ice hockey gold medal at the Milano Cortina Winter Olympics by February 22, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-14. The Milano Cortina Winter Olympics are scheduled for February 2026 in Italy. The men's ice hockey tournament will end with one national team winning the gold medal.
---
QID: 489825
Title: What letters will the new alliance of six Iranian Kurdish opposition groups formed by late February 2026 be known by, by March 5, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-14. Several Iranian Kurdish opposition factions are active near the Iraq-Iran border. As regional tensions rise, these groups may choose to coordinate under a single alliance.
---
QID: 493481
Title: Which country’s government will say it “strongly condemns” Pakistan’s air strikes on Afghan territory by February 27, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-09. Cross-border air strikes in South Asia can draw public responses from nearby governments, especially when civilian harm is alleged.
---
QID: 73075
Title: Which ambassador will France say it is summoning over comments on Quentin Deranque’s death by February 28, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-12. A deadly political assault in France is drawing national attention and could lead to a formal diplomatic response if foreign officials make public statements about it.
